Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Alyce Sandbach; Exhibits
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction.

The unopposed motion for entry of the stipulated judgment is granted.

Order is signed. Parties may submit the stipulated judgment for signature by delivering a hard copy to Department 301.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
